strengths: ~17 years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices
Founder of open-source GIS platform demonstrating entrepreneurial initiative
Public technical leadership via workshops, talks, and open-source libraries
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise — only brief mention of MCP tooling at current role
No evidence of cloud platform strategy or large-scale cloud architecture leadership
Career level is Senior/Staff engineer, not Principal/Director-level IC with strategic advisory experience

key_factors.factor: AI/ML depth and demonstrated AI products
Cloud platform strategy and architecture leadership
Breadth of engineering experience and OSS founding

response.justification: The role demands a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products, and cloud platform strategy fluency. The résumé shows strong, versatile full-stack engineering across ~17 years with entrepreneurial signal (GISCollective founder, OSS libraries, workshops), but AI exposure is limited to a recent mention of MCP code generators at re:cinq with no shipped AI products, research, or platform work cited. Cloud experience is present (AWS CDK, Kubernetes deployment) but at implementation rather than strategic-advisory scale, and the trajectory tops out at Staff/Senior rather than Principal. Without evidence of AI thought leadership or strategic customer advisory work, the fit for a Principal AI Strategy role is weak despite solid engineering fundamentals.
